Normal Load
Local Computer
Performance Mode

= Py 3.13 master hr=7.1.2 =
load_testing_output/normal_load-num_users_32-spawn_rate_8-run_time_600-2026-02-17 11:20:17.003019_stats.csv
50%: 1100
95%: 1700
Average Content Size: 105162.77032679738
Average Response Time: 1168.1315024245698
Failure Count: 0
Failures/s: 0.0
Max Response Time: 2439.213510020636
Median Response Time: 1100.0
Min Response Time: 154.1020910954103
Name: /predict/headroom/v1
Request Count: 15300
Requests/s: 27.292795198273794
Type: POST

= Py 3.13 with CEG assert branch =
50%: 1000
95%: 1700
Average Content Size: 109357.18849142636
Average Response Time: 1149.7318635635754
Failure Count: 0
Failures/s: 0.0
Max Response Time: 2341.6700499365106
Median Response Time: 1000.0
Min Response Time: 135.4253920726478
Name: /predict/headroom/v1
Request Count: 15571
Requests/s: 27.727917143036596
Type: POST

= Py 3.11.12 with CEG assert branch =
50%: 1300
95%: 1800
Average Content Size: 102643.10328059224
Average Response Time: 1291.6117046073107
Failure Count: 0
Failures/s: 0.0
Max Response Time: 2426.4205049257725
Median Response Time: 1300.0
Min Response Time: 150.89812106452882
Name: /predict/headroom/v1
Request Count: 13778
Requests/s: 24.669804986829845
Type: POST



= Py 3.11.12 master hr=7.1.2 =
50%: 1200
95%: 1900
Average Content Size: 100344.35306985563
Average Response Time: 1300.711863415132
Failure Count: 0
Failures/s: 0.0
Max Response Time: 2392.84990192391
Median Response Time: 1200.0
Min Response Time: 163.79472299013287
Name: /predict/headroom/v1
Request Count: 13714
Requests/s: 24.50733339601262
Type: POST


= 2026-02-17 load testing =
HR: 7.4.2
service-headroom: 1da26a8f77e4

50%: 920
95%: 1600
Average Content Size: 107890.2584389435
Average Response Time: 1063.7728242853204
Failure Count: 0
Failures/s: 0.0
Max Response Time: 3182.166661019437
Median Response Time: 920.0
Min Response Time: 135.87779505178332
Name: /predict/headroom/v1
Request Count: 16886
Requests/s: 29.96301724132891
Type: POST
